race.comment: OVERLOADED (7) stepped up to 2000m for the first time this prep and was good late in a BM58 at Albury last start. Always takes a while to find form in his preps so that third-up run across the border was encouraging. Ready to hit his straps today. Three-year-old OLYMPIAD (3) continued his solid form of late when a grinding third in a similar race to this at Horsham a fortnight ago. Blinkers come off. Going well enough to give this field a fright. VEGAS JACK (2) has been easily accounted for in his two runs this prep in unsuitably short races. Worth noting he scored third-up last prep over 2000m at Mornington. Anticipating a return to form now that he gets to the right race. SIR DAVY (1) has been out of the winner's list for a long while but this race represents a huge class drop on what he is used to. Placed two from two at this track. No surprise to see him back in form. HEIRONAUT (4) gets beyond a mile for the first time in his brief career. Should measure up.
